name: test_consent_refused_for_mmr_vaccination
description:
Test: Submit an online consent form refusing MMR vaccination and
   verify confirmation.
Steps:
1. Fill in child and parent details on the consent page.
2. Select 'do not agree' to vaccination.
3. Choose refusal reason and provide details.
4. Submit the consent form.
Verification:
- Confirmation text indicates consent was refused for MMR vaccination.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Submit an online consent form refusing MMR vaccination and
verify confirmation.
Steps:

  1. Fill in child and parent details on the consent page.
  2. Select 'do not agree' to vaccination.
  3. Choose refusal reason and provide details.
  4. Submit the consent form.
    Verification:
  • Confirmation text indicates consent was refused for MMR vaccination.
statusMessage:
playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.get_attribute: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="View the MMR(V) online consent form")
